title: Cleaning an OT-2 COVID-19 Diagnostic Station

Different parts of the OT-2 are affected differently by cleaning agents, and some parts shouldn't be cleaned at all.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":8,"length":17}],"data":[]},{"key":"e7tm0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8m6a9","text":"In particular, avoid:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6ajho","text":"The X and Y rails and carriages.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"16phv","text":"Pulleys and belts.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bpnfr","text":"Electronics, buttons, and switches.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4f83l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bmr58","text":"Avoid spraying the OT-2 directly: the cleaning agents might go where you don't want them. steps: Wipe these parts of the OT-2 down with a 1:10 dilution of bleach: The clear polycarbonate windows. The black pipette stems. (Avoid the rest of the pipettes, including the ejectors.) The aluminum deck. The removable black trash bin.

Wait 00:00:30 , then quickly rinse the bleach off with distilled water. The aluminum on the OT-2 will be discolored if the bleach sits for too long. In the long term, it may also cause more serious corrosion.

Wipe these parts of the OT-2 down with RNaseZap or RNase AWAY. The same parts that you wiped down with bleach: The clear polycarbonate windows. The black pipette stems. (Avoid the rest of the pipettes, including the ejectors.) The aluminum deck. The removable black trash bin. Plus these additional parts: The bottoms of the pipette ejectors. Any Temperature Modules or Magnetic Modules that the OT-2 has on its deck. Any 96 well aluminum blocks that are going to be used on the OT-2.
Rinse the RNaseZap or RNase AWAY off with distilled water.
Wipe the OT-2 dry, or let the water evaporate.
creator: Max Marrone
